tickets.title: Update pubspec.yaml with all dependencies
tickets.description: Update pubspec.yaml to include go_router, intl, fl_chart dependencies while keeping existing provider, shared_preferences, flutter_lints.
acceptance_criteria: pubspec.yaml includes provider ^6.0.5
pubspec.yaml includes shared_preferences ^2.2.2
pubspec.yaml includes go_router ^14.2.0
pubspec.yaml includes intl ^0.19.0
pubspec.yaml includes fl_chart ^0.68.0
pubspec.yaml includes flutter_lints ^4.0.0
flutter: uses-material-design: true is present
tickets.coder_notes: Preserve existing project name 'budget_app' and description. Keep sdk constraint >=2.19.0 <4.0.0.

tickets.title: Create Fortuna color tokens
tickets.description: Define all Fortuna MD3 color constants from the reference HTML Tailwind config as Dart static const Color values.
acceptance_criteria: File defines primary as Color(0xFF041627)
File defines surface as Color(0xFFF7F9FB)
File defines surfaceContainerLowest as Color(0xFFFFFFFF)
File defines surfaceContainer as Color(0xFFECEEF0)
File defines error as Color(0xFFBA1A1A)
File defines onPrimary as Color(0xFFFFFFFF)
File defines onSurface as Color(0xFF191C1E)
File defines secondaryContainer as Color(0xFFD5E0F7)
File defines tertiaryFixedDim as Color(0xFF4EDEA3)
File defines onTertiaryContainer as Color(0xFF00A572)
File defines outlineVariant as Color(0xFFC4C6CD)
File defines primaryContainer as Color(0xFF1A2B3C)
File defines secondary as Color(0xFF545F72)
File defines tertiaryContainer as Color(0xFF00311F)
File defines errorContainer as Color(0xFFFFDAD6)
File defines onSecondaryContainer as Color(0xFF586377)
File defines onTertiaryFixedVariant as Color(0xFF005236)
File defines onSurfaceVariant as Color(0xFF44474C)
tickets.coder_notes: Create a class FortunaColors with static const Color fields. Use exact hex values from the reference HTML tailwind config.

tickets.title: Create Fortuna text styles
tickets.description: Define the Fortuna typography scale from the reference HTML as Dart TextStyle constants using Inter font family.
acceptance_criteria: File defines displayLarge: 48px, w700, -0.02em letterSpacing
File defines headlineLg: 32px, w600, -0.01em letterSpacing
File defines headlineLgMobile: 28px, w600, -0.01em letterSpacing
File defines numericDisplay: 24px, w600
File defines titleMd: 20px, w600
File defines bodyLg: 16px, w400
File defines bodySm: 14px, w400
File defines labelCaps: 12px, w700, 0.05em letterSpacing
All styles use fontFamily 'Inter'
All styles use onSurface color from FortunaColors
tickets.coder_notes: Create a class FortunaTextStyles with static const TextStyle fields. Reference the exact fontSize/lineHeight/fontWeight/letterSpacing from the HTML tailwind config.

tickets.title: Create Fortuna app theme
tickets.description: Define the MaterialApp ThemeData using Fortuna color tokens and text styles. Sets up light theme with MD3 color scheme.
acceptance_criteria: File exports a ThemeData via a static method or const
ColorScheme uses FortunaColors.primary as primary
ColorScheme uses FortunaColors.surface as surface
ColorScheme uses FortunaColors.error as error
CardTheme defined with rounded corners and subtle shadow
AppBarTheme defined with transparent background, no elevation
Scaffold backgroundColor uses FortunaColors.surface
TextTheme maps to FortunaTextStyles
tickets.coder_notes: Use ThemeData.light() as base, then override with Fortuna colors. Keep it simple — no dark mode per PRD out_of_scope.

tickets.title: Create loading widget
tickets.description: Reusable centered CircularProgressIndicator widget with Fortuna styling.
acceptance_criteria: Widget is a StatelessWidget
Displays a CircularProgressIndicator centered in the available space
Uses FortunaColors.primary as the indicator color
tickets.coder_notes: Simple wrapper — Center widget with CircularProgressIndicator.

tickets.title: Create error widget
tickets.description: Reusable error display widget with message and retry button using Fortuna error colors.
acceptance_criteria: Widget is a StatelessWidget accepting message and onRetry parameters
Displays error icon using FortunaColors.error
Shows the error message text
Includes a retry button that calls onRetry callback
tickets.coder_notes: Use Column with Icon, Text, and ElevatedButton. Style with FortunaColors.errorContainer background.

tickets.title: Create empty state widget
tickets.description: Reusable empty state widget with icon and message for lists with no data.
acceptance_criteria: Widget is a StatelessWidget accepting a message parameter
Displays an appropriate icon centered
Shows the message text below the icon
Uses FortunaColors.onSurfaceVariant for text color
tickets.coder_notes: Simple centered Column with Icons.inbox and Text.

tickets.title: Create app router with go_router
tickets.description: Define go_router routes for Dashboard and Transaction History screens with bottom navigation shell.
acceptance_criteria: Router defines /dashboard route mapping to DashboardScreen
Router defines /transactions route mapping to TransactionHistoryScreen
Initial location is /dashboard
Uses ShellRoute for bottom navigation on mobile
Exports a GoRouter instance via a top-level function or provider
tickets.coder_notes: Use StatefulShellRoute.indexedStack for bottom nav with tabs: Dashboard, Transactions. Add placeholder routes for Add and Budgets tabs per FEA-003.

tickets.title: Create BudgetModel data layer (preserve existing logic)
tickets.description: Migrate existing BudgetModel (ChangeNotifier) and Transaction classes from main.dart to their own file. Preserves all existing SharedPreferences CRUD logic.
acceptance_criteria: BudgetModel extends ChangeNotifier
BudgetModel has transactions getter returning List<Transaction>
BudgetModel has totalIncome getter summing positive amounts
BudgetModel has totalExpenses getter summing negative amounts absolute
BudgetModel has netBalance getter summing all amounts
BudgetModel has addTransaction(amount, description) method
BudgetModel has removeTransaction(int index) method
BudgetModel has loadTransactions() loading from SharedPreferences
BudgetModel has _saveTransactions() persisting to SharedPreferences
Transaction class has amount (double), description (String), date (DateTime) fields
Transaction has fromJson factory and toJson method
All existing functionality from main.dart BudgetModel is preserved
tickets.coder_notes: Copy the BudgetModel and Transaction classes from the existing main.dart exactly. Do not change any logic — this is a pure migration to a separate file.

tickets.title: Create Net Worth card widget
tickets.description: Total Net Worth card matching the reference HTML — large balance display, trend indicator with percentage, wallet icon, mini area chart placeholder.
acceptance_criteria: Card uses FortunaColors.surfaceContainerLowest background
Card has rounded-xl corners and subtle shadow per reference
Displays 'Total Net Worth' label in labelCaps style uppercase
Displays net balance in displayLarge style with FortunaColors.primary
Shows trend indicator with 'trending_up' icon and '+X.X% from last month' text in tertiary color
Shows account_balance_wallet icon in secondaryContainer circle
Includes a mini SVG-style area chart placeholder at bottom
Card is a StatelessWidget accepting balance and trendPercentage parameters
tickets.coder_notes: Use CustomPaint or a simple Container with gradient for the mini chart placeholder. Match the reference HTML structure: label row, balance row with icon, chart area.

tickets.title: Create Budget Progress card widget
tickets.description: Monthly Budget progress card matching the reference HTML — spent vs budget amount, progress bar, percentage consumed, remaining amount, 'View Budget Details' button.
acceptance_criteria: Card uses FortunaColors.primaryContainer background with onPrimary text
Displays 'Monthly Budget' label in labelCaps style with opacity
Shows spent amount in numericDisplay style with '/ $X,XXX' budget in bodySm
Progress bar uses white/10 background with tertiaryFixedDim fill
Shows 'XX% consumed' text and '$X,XXX remaining' in bold
Includes 'VIEW BUDGET DETAILS' button with white/10 background
Card is a StatelessWidget accepting spentAmount, totalBudget parameters
tickets.coder_notes: Use LinearProgressIndicator (or Container with fractional width) for the progress bar. Match the dark primaryContainer background from the reference.

tickets.title: Create Spending Categories card widget
tickets.description: Top Spending Categories card matching the reference HTML — category icons (restaurant, car, shopping bag), names, percentages, and horizontal progress bars.
acceptance_criteria: Card uses FortunaColors.surfaceContainerLowest background with rounded corners and shadow
Displays 'Top Spending Categories' title in titleMd style
Shows 'ALL CATEGORIES' text button
Each category row has: icon in secondaryFixedDim/30 circle, category name, percentage
Each category has a progress bar (1.5px height) with primary color fill
Categories include: Food & Dining (40%), Transport (20%), Shopping (15%) as sample data
Card is a StatelessWidget accepting List<SpendingCategory> parameter
tickets.coder_notes: Create a SpendingCategory data class with name, icon, percentage, color fields. Use Material Icons: restaurant, directions_car, shopping_bag. Compute categories from transactions grouped by description prefix or use sample data for v1.

tickets.title: Create Quick Insights card widget
tickets.description: Quick Insights card matching the reference HTML — Savings Goal and Bills Due in a 2-column grid with colored backgrounds.
acceptance_criteria: Card uses FortunaColors.surfaceContainerLowest background with rounded corners and shadow
Displays 'Quick Insights' title in titleMd style
2-column grid layout with Savings Goal and Bills Due cards
Savings Goal uses tertiaryFixed/10 background with savings icon and amount
Bills Due uses errorContainer/20 background with warning icon and days count
Card is a StatelessWidget accepting savingsGoal and billsDueDays parameters
tickets.coder_notes: Use GridView with 2 columns or Row with 2 Expanded children. Match the reference: savings icon in tertiary color, warning icon in error color.

tickets.title: Create Security Health card widget
tickets.description: Security Health card matching the reference HTML — circular progress indicator with score, verified_user icon, status text.
acceptance_criteria: Card uses FortunaColors.surfaceContainerLowest background with rounded corners and shadow
Displays 'Security Health' title in titleMd style
Shows verified_user filled icon in tertiaryContainer color
Circular progress indicator shows score (85) with primary color stroke
Text describes security status: 'Your account security score is high. Two-factor authentication is active.'
Card is a StatelessWidget accepting score parameter
tickets.coder_notes: Use CustomPaint or a circular Container with Stack to create the ring indicator. Match the SVG circle progress from the reference HTML.

tickets.title: Create Dashboard screen with bento grid layout
tickets.description: Main dashboard screen assembling all card widgets in a bento grid layout matching the reference HTML. Includes top app bar with Fortuna branding and notifications icon.
acceptance_criteria: Screen uses Scaffold with FortunaColors.surface background
Top app bar shows 'Fortuna' title in displayLarge style with user avatar circle and notifications icon
Body uses SingleChildScrollView with max-width 1200px constraint (center on desktop)
Layout uses bento grid: Net Worth (7/12 cols) + Budget (5/12 cols) on first row
Second row: Spending Categories (6/12) + Quick Insights/Security (6/12)
Cards have entrance animation with staggered fade-up (FEA-005)
Top app bar gains shadow on scroll (FEA-005)
Uses Consumer<BudgetModel> to read transaction data
Passes computed values (netBalance, budget, categories) to card widgets
Includes FAB for adding transactions on desktop, bottom nav on mobile
tickets.coder_notes: Use LayoutBuilder to determine mobile vs desktop layout. On mobile, stack cards vertically. On desktop (md breakpoint), use the 12-column grid. For animations, use AnimationController with staggered Tween<Offset> and FadeTransition.

tickets.title: Create Transaction History screen
tickets.description: Transaction history screen showing all transactions in a list with income/expense indicators and delete functionality. Preserves existing list UI logic.
acceptance_criteria: Screen uses Scaffold with FortunaColors.surface background
AppBar shows 'Transactions' title
Uses Consumer<BudgetModel> to display transactions
Shows loading widget while data loads
Shows empty state widget when no transactions exist
Each transaction shows: arrow icon (up=green for income, down=red for expense), description, amount
Each transaction has delete button that calls removeTransaction
Amount is displayed in green for income, red for expense
Includes FAB to add new transaction
tickets.coder_notes: Migrate the ListView.builder logic from existing main.dart. Keep the same delete behavior (reversed list index). Style with Fortuna colors.

tickets.title: Create Transaction Form widget
tickets.description: Reusable transaction form with amount input, description input, income/expense toggle, and submit button. Preserves existing form validation logic.
acceptance_criteria: Form has amount TextFormField with number keyboard and '$' prefix
Form has description TextFormField
Form has Income/Expense toggle (ChoiceChips or ToggleButtons)
Form validates amount is not empty and is a valid number
Form validates description is not empty
On submit, calls BudgetModel.addTransaction with correct sign (positive=income, negative=expense)
Clears form fields after successful submission
Styled with Fortuna colors and rounded corners
tickets.coder_notes: Migrate the _buildTransactionForm logic from existing main.dart. Use a GlobalKey<FormState> for validation. Show as modal bottom sheet or dialog.

tickets.title: Create main.dart entry point
tickets.description: App entry point wrapping the app in ChangeNotifierProvider<BudgetModel> and using go_router for navigation. Replaces the old main.dart.
acceptance_criteria: main() runs ChangeNotifierProvider<BudgetModel> wrapping the app
MaterialApp.router uses FortunaTheme from app_theme.dart
MaterialApp.router uses routerConfig from app_router.dart
App title is 'Fortuna'
debugBanner is false
tickets.coder_notes: Keep it minimal — just Provider setup + MaterialApp.router. All logic is in the feature files now.
